input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation notes that YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON file loading requires optional Hoplite format modules, but those are not needed to exercise hoplite-core itself; tests can use MapPropertySource or built-in .props support.

The native-image failure may still require metadata/test updates for Kotlin reflection, Hoplite decoders, or generated test data classes, but not pre-generation setup such as Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or environment/system properties.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is required. hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 is a pure JVM/Kotlin configuration library; its resolved dependencies are compile/runtime Kotlin and kotlinx-coroutines artifacts, and the core artifact itself includes the main loaders, decoders, MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, and a .props parser. Existing 2.9.0 tests already reach meaningful native-image-relevant coverage with only hoplite-core plus assertion libraries.
